title: 表立っては言わないけど

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from my outing with Gold City,
we pass by a bookstore in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh—it's that magazine... So they've even got it on
display here, huh.
choice_data_list:
Is that the one where you guys recommended
outfits to readers?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yup, the one you helped me with at the mall.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My recommendations were a hit at the studio too,
so thanks again.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Since we're here, can I look around a bit?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This one, this one... Oh, and this one too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stack of books Gold City chooses gets taller
and taller.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought she'd only be picking out magazines,
but there are denser paperbacks in the mix too.
choice_data_list: (Is she going to read all of them?)
(Is she going to read all of them?)

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Oh hey, if it isn't City!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, you're buy'n a lotta books!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, I do read quite a bit. You know, on
the bus, during downtime between shoots...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I see! And you even read tricky-look'n
books like these?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yep. These are recommendations from my
coworkers.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Gives you something to talk about, y'know? I try
to read all of them.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: That's so cool! You must be really good at work!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Sure... Anyway, why are you buying so many
books on training?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City points at a basket full of books Yukino
Bijin appears to have selected.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um, heh... I couldn't decide which one to buy,
so I kept putt'n more in the basket.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's none of my business, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Instead of buying every book under the sun, try
really digging into this one here. My trainer's read
it too, you know.
choice_data_list: You even read the stuff I read?
You even read the stuff I read?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I mean, training's easier when we're on the same
wavelength, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Plus, well... you actually have decent sense. I
found it useful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City never cuts corners, no matter how busy
she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Is there anything I can do to help?
choice_data_list: Recommend her a book on training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I recommend a book that would pair well with
Gold City's suggestion.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Golly... This one's a lot more compact'n the other
books I found...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm sure you've got nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Should be able to trust a trainer's picks when it
comes to books about training, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but swell with pride a little after Gold
City's comment. I decide to buy them each a copy
of the book I recommended.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To learn more about modeling, I decide to buy an
autobiography of a famous model.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Why that book? Modeling isn't your thing, is it?
choice_data_list: Well, shouldn't we be on the same wavelength?
Well, shouldn't we be on the same wavelength?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that I want to do my best to match her
effort and enthusiasm.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's amaz'n! It's like I'm watch'n a teen
drama!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
What the—what do you mean? This is nothing like
that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Anyway, Trainer, I... I appreciate the thought.
